method: EO triangulated from league.json (15-man template = Haaland/B.Fernandes/Gabriel; differentials cluster at 6.7% = 1 of 15 managers) + GW38 web signals. CRITICAL UPDATE supersedes prior draft: confirmed news now has Haaland CONFIRMED BENCHED (Guardiola World Cup rest) - he returns 0 for the ENTIRE FIELD, not just this user. Web confirms 62.5% owned + ~35% captaincy poll going into a blank. Gabriel confirmed OUT for season (was DOUBTFUL, now ruled out).
template_captain: Haaland was the template captain (~35% captaincy poll, 62.5% owned) but is CONFIRMED BENCHED and returns 0 for everyone. This is a LEAGUE-WIDE leveller: the ~35% who captained Haaland eat a 0. The captaincy vacuum shifts to Salah (LIV) and B.Fernandes (MUN). Salah is the smart-money pivot captain and the new de facto template armband for anyone tracking the news.

effective_ownership.note: BENCHED-0 LEAGUE-WIDE. ~62.5% own + ~35% (C). His blank is NEUTRAL to us - we correctly hold him on the bench (slot 13). The 35% who armbanded him lose vs the field.
Our VICE. Now the highest-floor pivot captain post-Haaland-blank; captaincy share rising. HIGH EO + HIGH FLOOR = captain shield.
2nd in captaincy poll. We do NOT own - secondary captain-blowup exposure if he hauls (away at Brighton).
Our current (C). Low-EO differential captain - home v Leeds, on pens. Lower floor than Salah.
CONFIRMED OUT for season - dead asset. Template-owned so a 0 is roughly neutral vs field, but MUST be subbed out of XI for a playing defender (Munoz).
Sub-8% differential we own - small edge vs league (AVL away at City, ceiling capped).

captain_shield.why: MUST-NOT-MISS. With Haaland blanked, Salah is the highest-floor premium and the smart-money captain pivot - share rising toward the top of the poll. We own him as VICE. If everyone pivots to Salah (C) and he hauls while we keep (C) on Bowen, that is the single biggest avoidable rank loss this GW. DO NOT FADE. APEX Protocol (cum_pts leader, nailed premium, not GK) also points to Salah. sim-lab/gaffer: keep/move (C) to Salah.

differentials.why: Pens + home v Leeds (nothing to play for), survival-motivated WHU. Only 10% captain him so a Bowen haul gains rank. Rank-chasing captain lever ONLY - lower floor than Salah, so it is the high-variance option, not the safe one.
CRY forward, low EO, pen/aerial threat - owned differential vs template-heavy rivals.
NFO target-man, low EO, goal threat - owned swing potential.

differential_opportunity: The Haaland blank is a free leveller: the ~35% who captained him eat a 0, so simply NOT captaining Haaland already lands a top-third outcome. Our owned sub-8% edges (Rogers 7%) and low-EO forwards (Mateta 9%, Wood 8%) add raw-points swing. Bowen (C) at ~10% captaincy is a genuine differential captain IF chasing rank, but carries more floor risk than the Salah pivot.

rank_risks.why: If we keep (C) on Bowen and the field pivots Salah (C) into a haul, we lose ground to most of the league. Salah is in our squad as vice - the fix is free: move the armband.
26%-captained template MID we do NOT own. A Bruno haul away at Brighton compounds any Salah-captain gap.
CONFIRMED OUT - blanks an XI slot if not subbed. Swap to Munoz pre-deadline (auto-sub may not cover cleanly).

recommendation: Haaland's confirmed league-wide blank neutralises our biggest template gap - holding him on the bench (slot 13) is now correct and costs nothing. The live risk has shifted to the captaincy pivot: per APEX Protocol and captain-shield logic, MOVE the armband from Bowen to M.Salah (our vice) - he is the must-not-miss, highest-floor pivot and the new template captain post-Haaland. Sub Gabriel (OUT) -> Munoz to avoid blanking an XI slot. If purely rank-chasing in a decided spot, Bowen (C)/TC is the high-variance lever, but the floor-correct, captain-shield play is Salah (C). Net: Salah (C), Bowen -> normal start, bench Haaland, start Munoz for Gabriel.
